title: LegionsTagger
description: A Tiertagger for the Quipconomy (Ratings of legions.novality.xyz)
body:
# LegionsTagger

## Features

-  Original legions HEX rating colors (0.1 – 2.0)
-  Configurable Left / Right tier tag positioning next to the Nametag and TAB list username
-  Full ModMenu configuration support
-  LegionsTagger is built for legions.novality.xyz as a Tiertagger.

  
Ratings are getting resolved from the Quipconomy Google Doc Spreadsheet.

-> https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12Z7eMO_fSv5SMlFybVJBLIpMWQ7wC6YaV9wVQQVY1ko/edit?usp=sharing~~~~

For any Issues/Bugs etc. feel free to contact me on Discord: @henrikvy
